notes: Subject-disposition flowchart counts: the upstream PROC SQL block deriving every box count via 'select count(*) into :macrovar trimmed from gml219 where <flag combination>' plus the %eval derivations, kept verbatim. External libraw.gml219 replaced by a 24-row synthetic GML219 in autoexec with the disposition flags the program counts on (fasfl, ind2fl, c1fl, c2fl, c3fl, ppsfl). Results presented via PROC PRINT instead of the upstream SGPLOT/annotate rendering; SQL count expressions are upstream-verbatim.
